creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: swills
Date: Sat Jul 13 02:00:24 2013
New Revision: 322876
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/322876

Log:
  - Update to 0.10.13
  
  PR:		ports/179878
  Approved by:	maintainer timeout (voldern@hoeggen.net, >2 weeks)

Modified:
  head/databases/rubygem-do_mysql/Makefile   (contents, props changed)
  head/databases/rubygem-do_mysql/distinfo   (contents, props changed)

Modified: head/databases/rubygem-do_mysql/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/databases/rubygem-do_mysql/Makefile	Fri Jul 12 23:55:21 2013	(r322875)
+++ head/databases/rubygem-do_mysql/Makefile	Sat Jul 13 02:00:24 2013	(r322876)
@@ -1,19 +1,15 @@
-# New ports collection makefile for: rubygem-do_mysql
-# Date created:		28 April 2009
-# Whom:		Espen Volden aka voldern <voldern@hoeggen.net>
-#
+# Created by: Espen Volden aka voldern <voldern@hoeggen.net>
 # $FreeBSD$
-#
 
 PORTNAME=	do_mysql
-PORTVERSION=	0.10.8
+PORTVERSION=	0.10.13
 CATEGORIES=	databases rubygems
 MASTER_SITES=	RG
 
 MAINTAINER=	voldern@hoeggen.net
 COMMENT=	Ruby DataObjects driver for MySQL
 
-RUN_DEPENDS=	rubygem-data_objects>=0.10.8:${PORTSDIR}/databases/rubygem-data_objects
+RUN_DEPENDS=	rubygem-data_objects>=0.10.13:${PORTSDIR}/databases/rubygem-data_objects
 
 USE_MYSQL=	yes
 USE_RUBY=	yes

Modified: head/databases/rubygem-do_mysql/distinfo
==============================================================================
--- head/databases/rubygem-do_mysql/distinfo	Fri Jul 12 23:55:21 2013	(r322875)
+++ head/databases/rubygem-do_mysql/distinfo	Sat Jul 13 02:00:24 2013	(r322876)
@@ -1,2 +1,2 @@
-SHA256 (rubygem/do_mysql-0.10.8.gem) = 2bfc79cb606ca39167e2220c818650b1c5a9a1ae918efe4ee5fd9c21769aed1c
-SIZE (rubygem/do_mysql-0.10.8.gem) = 27136
+SHA256 (rubygem/do_mysql-0.10.13.gem) = d7d981d62c9f16d6cf9d4e927c2d5ab29886b4314a34f88106ec75dc6b1efecb
+SIZE (rubygem/do_mysql-0.10.13.gem) = 29184
